describe: A real ctx.db.insert via runtime.run that fits but pushes the workspace budget at/above the approaching threshold is ACCEPTED (non-blocking) and surfaces a quota.approaching warning on the response `quota_warnings` field + as a `quota.approaching` event, carrying the projected/limit bytes and the compaction/cleanup/export suggestion — distinct from the hard over-quota rejection. NEVER a deletion.

write_run.title: small add that still fits but trips approaching
